LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF NILS LOMMERIN'S MOTION FOR ENFORCEMENT OF SETTLEMENT (SECTION 664.6) IS DENIED. THE THREE "MISSING" ITEMS HAD PREVIOUSLY BEEN CANCELLED. BECAUSE TWO OF THE ITEMS WERE NOT DELIVERED TO PLAINTIFF UNTIL AFTER THE MOTION WAS FILED, THE COURT DECLINES TO AWARD FEES TO EITHER PARTY. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF NILS LOMMERIN'S MOTION FOR ENFORCEMENT OF SETTLEMENT IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 6, 2012 TO PROVIDE THE MOVING PARTY AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS MUST BE DELIVERED TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN 4PM APRIL 3 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE. THE COURT HAS RECEIVED COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-19-2012 Vacated

Mtn For Enforcement Of Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JEFFREY D. POLSKY OF THE FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP, TEL. NO. 364-5540 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. KEVIN MARTIN OF PATTON MARTIN & SULLIVAN LLP, TEL. NO. (925) 600-1800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF NILS LOMMERIN'S Motion For Enforcement Of Settlement (Section 664.6) is Denied. The three "missing" items had previously been cancelled. Because two of the items were not delivered to plaintiff until after the motion was filed, the court declines to award fees to either party. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)

Mtn For Enforcement Of Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-03-2012 Continued To Apr-06-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF NILS LOMMERIN'S Motion For Enforcement Of Settlement is Continued to April 6, 2012 to provide the moving party an opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Courtesy copies of the moving papers must be delivered to department 302 no later than 4pm April 3 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. The court has received copies of the opposition and reply papers. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)
